title: Tetrion Pine Professional Woodfil 400g
features: SUPER SMOOTH FINISH: Revolutionary vacuum process gives an air hole and pinhole-free, super smooth finish.
DRY IN 30 MINUTES: Woodfil can be sanded after 20 minutes and over painted after 30 minutes.
PERFECT FINISH: Woodfil can be sanded, carved and planed - allowing you to trim and smooth and excess for the perfect finish
SENSATIONAL STRENGTH: Woodfil's strength means it can be drilled and screwed into, allowing you to secure fixings after filling
EXTERIOR USE: Woodfil is waterproof and designed to be used outdoors.
description: Product Description The Tetrion brand is one of the most recognisable names within the professional trade market over the last 40+ years. At its launch in the early 1970’s Tetrion changed the filler market with the innovation of the first ‘All Purpose Filler’. With Fillers, Adhesives, Decorating Sundries, and much more, Tetrion covers every aspect of modern household decorating, attracting new tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts with its reputation as one of, if not the best homecare range on the market. Tetrion Woodfil Natural/Pine 400g Tetrion Woodfil with the new revolutionary vacuum process gives an airhole and pinhole-free super smooth finish. Tetrion Woodfil can be sawn, drilled, screwed, sanded, planed, carved, and painted. Available in White or Natural/Pine. Flex with the expansion and contraction of wood and allow for moderate flexing, for example on chair legs, wooden steps, etc. Fast setting - Starts to set in 5 to 10 minutes Can be sanded within 30 minutes and is ready for painting after 45 minutes at a normal room temperature Versatile - Use inside or out for replacing decayed wood as well as for filling woodgrain, screw holes and cracks and joints in furniture, windows, and door frames, etc. Weatherproof - Resistant to water, seawater, oil, petrol, atmospheric chemicals and frost Heavy duty, waterproof 2 part filler, provides perfect finish. Amazing for replacing decayed wood Revolutionary vacuum process gives an airhole and pinhole-free, super smooth finish Fills all wood types, ideal for filling woodgrain, screw holes, and cracks and joints in furniture, windows, door frames, etc. Just like real wood, Woodfil can be sawn, drilled, screwed, sanded, planed, carved, and painted Directions for use: 1. Preparation - Surfaces must be dry, clean and free from oil, grease and loose material. Remove rotten wood and allow sound wood to dry before filling. Score smooth surfaces with an abrasive to provide a good key 2. Mixing - Mix the amount needed for requirements. Mix the wood filler in the following proportions, one part hardener (approx. 5cm ribbon) with 50 parts Woodfil (approx. 1 golf ball size). Mix thoroughly until no streaks remain and the colour is uniform 3. Application - Once the Woodfil and hardener have been mixed, the usable life is approximately 5 minutes. Apply filler to job leaving slightly "proud" of the surface. When hard, sand down to the correct contour. Large holes should be built up in layers. Never return mixed filler to the tin 4. Finishing - Treat exactly as wood, can be machined, sanded, filed, drilled, etc. When fully cured Woodfil can be sprayed, painted, primed or coated by all the standard methods. Important Setting is speeded up in hot temperatures and slowed down in cold temperatures Do not use if temperature is below 5°C (41°F) or above 30°C (86°F). Hardened Woodfil can withstand periodic exposure to temperatures as low as -20°C or as high as 100°C Store in a cool place avoiding excessive heat and frost Not recommended for use on glass Pack includes hardener and Spreader. Extra hardener tubes can be obtained from your supplier.
